leadText: The Rainbow Pass (Japanese: レインボーパス Rainbow Pass) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III. It is one of the Sevii Island passes.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen [ edit | edit source ] The Rainbow Pass allows the player to travel via the Seagallop ferries between Vermilion City 's port and the Sevii Islands . The player must have previously obtained the Tri-Pass , which grants access to One Island , Two Island , and Three Island . Once the Rainbow Pass is obtained as well, the player will also have access to Four Island , Five Island , Six Island , and Seven Island . The player is required to own the Rainbow Pass in order to use the event-only AuroraTicket or MysticTicket , to travel to the Birth Island and Navel Rock , respectively.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description FR LG A pass for ferries between Vermilion and the Sevii Islands . It features a drawing of a rainbow. E For ferries serving Vermilion and the Sevii Islands .
